overview: LXMF Ledger is a learning/demo payment ledger for Reticulum/LXMF mesh network users, supporting test deposits, HTLCs, signature-based authorization, and now payment channels with cooperative close.
features: Test faucet deposits for any LXMF hash
Hash Time Locked Contracts with SHA-256 preimage release and expiry refund
Ed25519 signature-based authorization for locking funds
Public key registration per LXMF hash
Payment channels with open, join, and cooperative close
Persistent event log of all state changes
Auto-refreshing dashboard with live message previews for offline signing
